code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_PaymentGateway] --> Initializing: Component mounted

    Initializing --> Loading: Subscribe to DMs
    Loading --> Empty: No messages
    Loading --> ThreadList: Messages loaded
    Loading --> Error: Subscription failed

    Empty --> ThreadList: First message received

    ThreadList --> ThreadSelected: User selects thread
    ThreadSelected --> ThreadList: Back to list
    ThreadSelected --> Composing: User types message

    Composing --> Encrypting: User sends
    Encrypting --> Publishing: Encryption complete
    Publishing --> ThreadSelected: Publish success
    Publishing --> Error: Publish failed

    ThreadSelected --> MarkingRead: Auto-mark as read
    MarkingRead --> ThreadSelected: Update complete

    ThreadList --> Refreshing: Pull to refresh
    Refreshing --> ThreadList: Refresh complete

    ThreadSelected --> Deleting: User deletes thread
    Deleting --> ThreadList: Delete complete

    Error --> ThreadList: Retry success
    Error --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue]: Fatal error

    note right of Encrypting
        NIP04Service encrypts
        message using recipient's
        public key
    end note

    note right of Publishing
        EventPublisherService
        publishes kind 4 event
        to relays
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个支付网关的DM模块状态图。核心是从FinTech_PaymentGateway启动，经过Initializing和Loading，然后分叉到Empty或者ThreadList。用户选中会话后进入ThreadSelected，这里要能发消息、删会话、标记已读。
确认一下，Loading到Empty是「No messages」，到ThreadList是「Messages loaded」，对吧？还有Error状态怎么处理？
对，Loading的时候订阅失败会进Error。另外Empty收到第一条消息要能流转到ThreadList。Error可以重试成功回到ThreadList，但如果是Fatal error就要终止到FinTech_TransactionQueue。
画好了主干。ThreadSelected我加了三个出口：Back to list返回ThreadList，User types message进入Composing，还有Pull to refresh到Refreshing。
Composing之后要加密，用NIP04Service。所以Composing发送后先进Encrypting，加密完成再到Publishing。这两个节点我想加注释说明实现细节。
加上了Encrypting和Publishing，注释也写好了。Publishing成功返回ThreadSelected，失败进Error。还有MarkingRead和Deleting两个分支，Auto-mark as read和User deletes thread，都画上了。
Deleting的终点不对，删完应该回到ThreadList而不是留在ThreadSelected。还有MarkingRead完成后的返回箭头，标注应该是「Update complete」不是「Read complete」。
已修复，Deleting现在指向ThreadList，MarkingRead的返回标注也改成「Update complete」了。整个状态流转应该完整了，从PaymentGateway启动到各种用户操作和异常处理都覆盖到了。
